name: Startup Founder Discovery and AI-Powered Outreach with CrunchBase and Gmail

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "subject": "🚀 Startup Founder Highlights for Outreach - June 6, 2025",
  "body": "🚀 Here's a summary of promising startup founders for potential outreach:

🔹 **Jane Doe**
Co-Founder & CEO at Acme AI. She is a serial entrepreneur with over 10 years of experience in AI and SaaS startups. Educated at Stanford University with an MBA. You can find her on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/janedoe.

🔹 **John Smith**
CTO at GreenLoop. Passionate about sustainable packaging innovation and technology leadership. Holds a Bachelor’s degree in Environmental Engineering from MIT. Connect on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/johnsmith."
}

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert at writing concise, professional summaries for business email outreach. Given detailed information about a person’s professional profile, your task is to generate a short summary focusing only on the most relevant information for outreach emails.

Only include:
- Full name
- Current title/role
- Brief, relevant part of the biography (max 1-2 sentences)
- Key education highlights (school and degree)
- Social links (only LinkedIn or Twitter if available)
- Most relevant associated company (name and role)

Do NOT include unnecessary details. Make the summary clear, engaging, and suitable for a personalized outreach email introduction.

parameters.content:
## 🔁 **SECTION 1: Trigger + Company Fetching**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🔘 **Manual Trigger**
* 🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Updated Companies List**

---

### 🚀 What This Section Does

🔘 **Manual Trigger**
This allows you to manually run the automation anytime you want. Perfect for testing or when you only want to fetch founder data on demand (instead of a scheduled time).

🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Updated Companies List**
This node connects to the **Crunchbase API** to get a list of the latest startups or companies that have been updated recently.

#### 🔧 What You Can Customize

🛠️ **Page Query**:
In the URL or query parameters, you'll find something like `page=1`.
➡️ You can manually change this to `page=2`, `page=3`, etc., to explore other sets of companies.

🛠️ **Date Filter**:
The `updated_since` parameter can also be changed to look for startups updated within a certain time window.

---

## 👤 **SECTION 2: Founder Profile Fetching + Field Mapping**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Founder Profiles by UUID**
* ✏️ **Edit Fields – Extract Key Profile Data**

---

### 🔎 What This Section Does

🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Founder Profiles by UUID**
For each company fetched in Section 1, this node pulls the **detailed profile** of one person (typically a founder, CEO, or C-level executive).

✏️ **Edit Fields – Extract Key Profile Data**
This step takes the raw profile data and selects only the fields we care about:
✅ Full Name,
✅ Title,
✅ Biography,
✅ Education,
✅ Social Links,
✅ Associated Companies

#### 🔧 What You Can Customize

🔢 **Person Indexing**:
In this node’s configuration, you can find the list of people associated with a company.
➡️ To switch from Founder #1 to Founder #2, change the **item number** or **array index** — for example, from `[0]` to `[1]`.

💡 This is useful when a company has **multiple co-founders** or key executives you may want to evaluate separately.

---

## 🤖📨 **SECTION 3: AI-Powered Summary + Email Outreach**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🤖 **AI Agent – Generate Email Summary**
* 📧 **Gmail – Send Founder Digest**

---

### 🧠 What This Section Does

🤖 **AI Agent – Generate Email Summary**
This uses **OpenAI’s GPT model** with a **Structured Output Parser** to turn the extracted profile into a polished, professional email-ready summary.
It's trained to output:

> Jane Doe is currently Co-Founder & CEO at Acme AI. She is a serial entrepreneur with 10+ years in AI and SaaS. Educated at Stanford (MBA). Connect on LinkedIn: [https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe](https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe)

📧 **Gmail – Send Founder Digest**
Finally, this node **sends the email** — which could go to your team, your CRM, or even directly to your inbox — with a subject like:

> 🚀 Startup Founder Highlights for Outreach - June 6, 2025

=======================================
            WORKFLOW ASSISTANCE
=======================================
For any questions or support, please contact:
    Yaron@nofluff.online

Explore more tips and tutorials here:
   - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@YaronBeen/videos
   - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yaronbeen/
=======================================

## 🔁 **SECTION 1: Trigger + Company Fetching**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🔘 **Manual Trigger**
* 🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Updated Companies List**

---

### 🚀 What This Section Does

🔘 **Manual Trigger**
This allows you to manually run the automation anytime you want. Perfect for testing or when you only want to fetch founder data on demand (instead of a scheduled time).

🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Updated Companies List**
This node connects to the **Crunchbase API** to get a list of the latest startups or companies that have been updated recently.

#### 🔧 What You Can Customize

🛠️ **Page Query**:
In the URL or query parameters, you'll find something like `page=1`.
➡️ You can manually change this to `page=2`, `page=3`, etc., to explore other sets of companies.

🛠️ **Date Filter**:
The `updated_since` parameter can also be changed to look for startups updated within a certain time window.

---

## 👤 **SECTION 2: Founder Profile Fetching + Field Mapping**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Founder Profiles by UUID**
* ✏️ **Edit Fields – Extract Key Profile Data**

---

### 🔎 What This Section Does

🌐 **HTTP Request – Fetch: Founder Profiles by UUID**
For each company fetched in Section 1, this node pulls the **detailed profile** of one person (typically a founder, CEO, or C-level executive).

✏️ **Edit Fields – Extract Key Profile Data**
This step takes the raw profile data and selects only the fields we care about:
✅ Full Name,
✅ Title,
✅ Biography,
✅ Education,
✅ Social Links,
✅ Associated Companies

#### 🔧 What You Can Customize

🔢 **Person Indexing**:
In this node’s configuration, you can find the list of people associated with a company.
➡️ To switch from Founder #1 to Founder #2, change the **item number** or **array index** — for example, from `[0]` to `[1]`.

💡 This is useful when a company has **multiple co-founders** or key executives you may want to evaluate separately.

---

## 🤖📨 **SECTION 3: AI-Powered Summary + Email Outreach**

**🧱 Nodes:**

* 🤖 **AI Agent – Generate Email Summary**
* 📧 **Gmail – Send Founder Digest**

---

### 🧠 What This Section Does

🤖 **AI Agent – Generate Email Summary**
This uses **OpenAI’s GPT model** with a **Structured Output Parser** to turn the extracted profile into a polished, professional email-ready summary.
It's trained to output:

> Jane Doe is currently Co-Founder & CEO at Acme AI. She is a serial entrepreneur with 10+ years in AI and SaaS. Educated at Stanford (MBA). Connect on LinkedIn: [https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe](https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe)

📧 **Gmail – Send Founder Digest**
Finally, this node **sends the email** — which could go to your team, your CRM, or even directly to your inbox — with a subject like:

> 🚀 Startup Founder Highlights for Outreach - June 6, 2025

#### 🛠️ What You Can Customize

* ✍️ Change the **recipient** to your sales or outreach inbox
* 🖋️ Modify the **subject line** to match your brand or campaign
* 📬 Send to **multiple emails** using a comma-separated list

---

## ✅ Final Thoughts: How You Can Use This

This workflow is perfect for:

* 🚀 Startup Scouts
* 📬 Cold Outreach Campaigns
* 🧠 VC Analysts or Tech Researchers
* 🧩 Enriching founder data in your CRM

💥 **No more copy-pasting Crunchbase profiles manually!**
Just trigger the workflow, skim the summaries, and reach out.

---
